modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Mouse is not functioning on USD computer.

full_description_text:  
The user reported that their mouse has stopped working completely. They were attempting to use it for regular tasks on their USD computer when the issue occurred. This has caused a disruption in their workflow, and they are unsure of how to resolve the problem.
short_description: Mouse is not functioning on USD computer.
description: The user reported that their mouse has stopped working completely. They were attempting to use it for regular tasks on their USD computer when the issue occurred. This has caused a disruption in their workflow, and they are unsure of how to resolve the problem.
